subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Hearken unto that which the Lord of Eternity proclaimeth from this manifest horizon. Bear thou witness unto that whereunto He hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم ان استمع ما ینطق به مالک القدم من هذا الشطر المبین ان اشهد بما شهد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
